name: Spaghetti and Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, mix all ingredients except meatballs and spaghetti.
2. Break up the tomatoes and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Prepare the meatballs and drain excess fat.
5. Stir the meatballs into the tomato mixture and continue simmering for another 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve over spaghetti and, if desired, with Parmesan cheese.
